challenges.title: Table Border Collapse
challenges.description: Style a table by setting border-collapse to collapse and adding a 1px solid border to both the table and td elements. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'border-collapse' in css.lower(), 'Should use border-collapse property'
assert 'collapse' in css.lower(), 'Should set border-collapse to collapse'
assert 'border' in css.lower(), 'Should add a border to table elements'
assert 'solid' in css.lower(), 'Should use a solid border style'
hints: Use border-collapse: collapse on the table element.
Add border: 1px solid to both table and td selectors.

challenges.title: Advanced Table Styling
challenges.description: Style a table using caption-side: bottom, border-spacing: 10px, and table-layout: fixed. Also set a width of 100% on the table. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'caption-side' in css.lower(), 'Should use caption-side property'
assert 'bottom' in css.lower(), 'Should set caption-side to bottom'
assert 'border-spacing' in css.lower(), 'Should use border-spacing property'
assert '10px' in css.lower(), 'Should set border-spacing to 10px'
assert 'table-layout' in css.lower(), 'Should use table-layout property'
assert 'fixed' in css.lower(), 'Should set table-layout to fixed'
assert '100%' in css.lower(), 'Should set width to 100%'
hints: caption-side controls where the <caption> element appears relative to the table.
border-spacing sets the distance between cell borders (only works when border-collapse is separate).
table-layout: fixed makes columns equal width based on the first row.
